subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad-i-'Alí! Hearken unto the Call from the luminous Tree that hath been planted by the hands of bounty in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد قبل علی اسمع الندآء من السدره النورآء المغروسه بایادی العطاء فی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
